github.description: GitHub MCP - PR 管理、Issue 跟踪、代码搜索、仓库操作

playwright.description: Playwright MCP - 浏览器自动化 E2E 测试（本地需 Playwright 已安装）

notes.github: 需要设置 GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN 环境变量: export GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=ghp_xxx
notes.playwright: 需要先安装 Playwright: cd Playwright/e2e && npm install && npx playwright install chromium
notes.postgres_future: 项目重度使用 PostgreSQL + pgvector，建议后续添加 Postgres MCP server 以支持数据库检查与查询调试
